verb.frequency: Oxford English Corpus 빈도 상위 (회화 1위 동사)

meanings.example: I got the audit report this morning.
I'll get to the office by 9.
The case got escalated to the head of compliance.
meanings.exampleKo: 그 케이스는 컴플라이언스 본부장에게 에스컬레이션 됐어요.

chunks.example: I'll get in touch with the merchant for clarification.
We need to get rid of duplicate KYC records.
I'll get back to you with the analysis by Friday.
The merchant got involved in suspicious cross-border activity.
Let's get the STR filing done before the deadline.

pronTip.title: GET 동사 발음 핵심
points: get [겟] — 짧은 e 소리, t 살짝 끊기
getting [게링] — 미국식 t는 d 비슷하게 (flap T)
축약: I've got / I've gotta = have to (구어체)
get to [게투] — t 한 번만, 부드럽게 연결

listening.title: AML 케이스 후속 조치 시나리오
listening.source: AML 업무 + Cambridge Dictionary 청크 검증
listening.fullText: Manager: Did you get the merchant's response yet? Staff: Not yet. I'll get in touch with them today. Manager: Good. We need to get rid of the outdated KYC files first. Staff: Already on it. I'll get back to you once it's done. Manager: This case got escalated, so let's get it done quickly. Staff: Understood. The merchant got involved in three flagged transactions last month.

blanks.suffix: escalated, so let's get it done quickly.

examples5.label: 수령
examples5.en: I got an email from the FIU this morning.

examples5.label: 이동·도달
examples5.en: I'll get to the meeting room in 5 minutes.

examples5.label: 연루
examples5.en: The merchant got involved in a layering scheme.

examples5.label: 후속 답변
examples5.en: Let me check and get back to you by EOD.

examples5.label: 완료
examples5.en: Let's get this report done before the audit visit.
examples5.ko: 감사 방문 전에 이 보고서를 끝내죠.

writing5.en: I got the audit report this morning.

writing5.ko: 그 케이스는 컴플라이언스 본부장에게 에스컬레이션 됐어요.
writing5.en: The case got escalated to the head of compliance.
I'll get in touch with the merchant for clarification.
We need to get rid of duplicate KYC records.
Let's get the STR filing done before the deadline.

challenge3sec.en: I'll get back to you today.
I'll get in touch with the merchant.
Let's get this case done quickly.
The merchant got involved in suspicious transactions.
We need to get rid of old data.

freewrite.situation: 최근 본인이 처리한 의심거래 케이스의 후속 조치 과정을 영어로 설명하세요. 누구에게 연락했고, 무엇을 받았으며, 어떻게 마무리됐는지 GET 동사 + 오늘 배운 청크를 사용해서 3-5문장으로 작성해보세요.
freewrite.hint: 활용: get in touch with, get back to, get involved in, get something done
freewrite.placeholder: 예: Last week I got an alert about an unusual cross-border transfer. I got in touch with the merchant immediately to verify...

office.info:
🏢 사내 미팅
업무 진행, 후속 조치, 일정 조율 — GET 동사가 행동·결과의 핵심!

dialog.text: Did you get a response from the legal team?
Not yet. I'll get in touch with them again today.
Good. Let's get this resolved by Friday.
When can we get together to review the new policy?
I can get to the meeting room around 3.
Perfect. I'll get the slides ready before then.
Where are we on the merchant cleanup project?
We got rid of about 200 inactive accounts last week. Another 500 to go.
Did the data team get involved in the analysis?
Yes, they did. They got back to me yesterday with their findings.
Great. Let's get the final report done by month-end.
Understood. I'll get in touch with each team lead to align.

rolePlay.scenario: AML 팀의 분기 프로젝트 진행 상황을 컴플라이언스 본부장에게 보고하세요. 무엇을 받았고, 누구와 협업했고, 무엇을 끝냈는지 GET 동사로 정리하세요.
rolePlay.aiOpening: Thanks for the update. Let me cut to the chase — where are we on the cleanup project, and what did we get from the data team's analysis? I want to get this wrapped up before Q-end.

email.info:
📧 이메일·메시지
응답, 연락, 회신 약속 — 격식 갖춘 GET 동사 활용!

dialog.text: Could you confirm the KYC status of merchant #842?
Let me check and get back to you within an hour.
Thanks, much appreciated.
Hi, I just got your file. Thanks for sending it over.
Did you get all the attachments?
Yes, I got everything. I'll get started on the review now.
Hi, just following up — did you get a chance to review the proposal?
Yes, I got it last Friday. Sorry for the delay in getting back to you.
No worries. Did your team get involved in evaluating it?
We did. The legal team got involved and raised a few concerns about data residency.
Understood. What would help you get this approved internally?
If we could get rid of the offshore data clause, that would help significantly. Can we get that done in the next round?

rolePlay.scenario: 외부 컨설팅사가 제안한 KYC 자동화 솔루션에 대해 후속 검토 답변을 보내야 합니다. 받은 자료, 내부 검토 결과, 추가 요청사항을 GET 동사로 정중하게 전달하세요.
rolePlay.aiRole: James, Senior Consultant at an international advisory firm
rolePlay.aiOpening: Hi, just circling back on the proposal we sent last week. Did you get a chance to review it with your team? Let me know what we can do to get this moving forward.

aml.info:
🚨 AML 실무
알람 수신, 케이스 에스컬레이션, 연루 분석 — GET 동사 핵심 활용!

dialog.text: I just got an alert on merchant #2026-815.
What did you get from the initial review?
The transaction got flagged for unusual volume.
Has this case gotten any worse since last week?
It has. Two more transactions got flagged yesterday.
Then we need to get this escalated immediately.
Walk me through how the case got flagged initially.
We got an automated alert based on threshold breach. The volume got 3x the usual within 7 days.
Did anyone external get involved at that stage?
Not external — but we got our data team involved to validate the pattern.
How quickly did you get the STR filed after that?
We got it done within 48 hours. The merchant didn't get back to us, so we filed without their input.
Good. We'll get back to you if we need additional information.

rolePlay.scenario: FIU에서 본인이 신고한 STR 케이스의 진행 과정에 대해 인터뷰를 진행합니다. 알람을 어떻게 받았고, 누가 관여했고, 어떻게 마무리됐는지 GET 동사로 답변하세요.
rolePlay.aiOpening: Thank you for making time. I want to walk through the timeline of case 2026-0419. How did the case first get flagged, and at what point did your team get the head of compliance involved?

social.info:
🌍 비즈니스 사교
네트워킹, 연락처 교환, 후속 약속 — 부드러운 GET 동사!

dialog.text: Let me get your contact info before we leave.
Sure! Here's my card. Let's get in touch next week.
Definitely. I'll get back to you on that webinar idea.
How did you get into AML originally?
I got involved through a fraud investigation project, then never left.
Funny how things work out!
I heard Korean PGs are getting more strict on merchant onboarding. Is that true?
It's true. We've gotten more cautious since the FATF mutual evaluation.
How do you get rid of high-risk merchants once they're onboarded?
It's tricky. We get our risk team involved early, and we have an offboarding protocol.
Could you get a few of us together for a roundtable on this?
I'd love to. Let me get in touch with my counterparts and get something organized.

rolePlay.scenario: ACAMS 컨퍼런스에서 다른 나라 컴플라이언스 담당자와 깊이 있는 업계 토론을 나누세요. 본인 경력, 한국 PG 동향, 향후 협업 가능성을 GET 동사로 자연스럽게 풀어내세요.
rolePlay.aiRole: Hannah, Head of AML at a global PG headquartered in Singapore
rolePlay.aiOpening: Great panel earlier! I've been wanting to get in touch with someone from a Korean PG. We're getting more deal flow from Korea and I want to get a sense of how local players approach merchant risk. Mind if we chat for a bit?

daily.info:
😊 일상 응용
이동, 일상 상태 변화, 친구와 약속 — 가장 친숙한 GET 동사!

dialog.text: What time can you get there?
I'll get there around 7. Got stuck in a meeting.
No worries, take your time.
You look tired — are you getting enough sleep?
Not really. I get about 5 hours these days.
You should get some rest this weekend.
How's the baby? Getting bigger?
She's getting huge! And she finally got her first tooth last week.
Aww! Are you getting any sleep at all?
Not much. But we got a night nurse to help on weekdays.
Smart move. Let's get together for dinner soon — I want to see her.
Definitely. Let me get back to you with some dates.

rolePlay.scenario: 오랜만에 만난 외국인 친구와 근황을 나누는 자리입니다. 최근 변화, 일상의 흐름, 향후 약속을 GET 동사로 자연스럽게 풀어내세요.
rolePlay.aiRole: Mike, an old friend now living in Australia
rolePlay.aiOpening: Hey! It's been ages. How have you been getting on? Last I heard you got a promotion and the family got bigger — give me the rundown!
